rulings.Case Title: 2400 PACIFIC AVENUE, LLC VS. MATTHEW A. BENNETT ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Dec. 28, 2020 line 8. DEFENDANT'S Demurrer To Complaint sustained at this time. Actions for recovery of COVID-19 debt shall be filed no earlier than March 1, 2021 and will be handled by Small Claims department. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 447-461 BROADWAY STREET, LLC VS. BENNETT M. MONTOYA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order, Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment-Notice To Karen A. King
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Dec. 28, 2020 line 3. Amended Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order, Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment-Notice To Karen A. King GRANTED in the amount of $195,708.33 plus interest at 10% (Complaint, paragraph 10) upon posting of $10,000 undertaking. Moving party to prepare order in accordance with this ruling. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: RIZING CAPITAL 8, LLC VS. OLUSOJI A FANOIKI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default Judgment And Entry Of Default And For Leave To Defend
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Dec. 28, 2020 line 4. DEFENDANT OLUSOJI FANOIKI's Motion To Set Aside Default Judgment And Entry Of Default And For Leave To Defend GRANTED. Defendant to file answer no later than 5:00 p.m. on December 28, 2020. Defendant to remit $870 (fees) to the Plaintiff no later than January 15, 2021. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MICHAEL SLADE VS. JEREMY GARDNER ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Dec. 28, 2020 line 5. DEFENDANT KINNARD HOCKENHULL's DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT CONTINUED TO JANUARY 6, 2020. PLAINTIFF TO SUBMIT A SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEF ADDRESSING DEFENDANT'S LEGAL ARGUMENT REGARDING APPLICABILITY OF TPA 2019 AS A "MORE PROTECTIVE" STATUTE THAN SFRO. BRIEF IS NOT TO EXCEED 2 PAGES AND SHALL BE FILED AND SERVED NO LATER THAN DECEMBER 30, 2020. DEFENDANT MAY FILE A REPLY NO LATER THAN JANUARY 4, 2020.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: URBANO BALLESTEROS VS. SANDRA GALVEZ ESCOBAR ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Dec. 28, 2020 line 6. DEFENDANTs SANDRA ESCOBAR, FERNANDA ROSALES, and JOSE ROSALES's DEMURRER to COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer and is not uncertain. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. JAVONTA LYKES ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Dec. 28, 2020 line 7. DEFENDANT JAVONTA LYKES's DEMURRER to COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR, First Amended Complaint on file. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CONARD HOUSE, INC. VS. JEAN-JACQUES ZENGER ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Dec. 28, 2020 line 9. DEFENDANT JEAN-JACQUES ZENGER's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Off calendar insufficient notice based on e service and no proof of service from the server based on personal service. = (501/REQ)
